sentences.target: Ich wische den Tisch mit dem Tuch.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvɪʃə deːn tɪʃ mɪt deːm tuːx/

translations.de: Ich wische den Tisch mit dem Tuch.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvɪʃə deːn tɪʃ mɪt deːm tuːx/
translations.en: I wipe the table with the cloth.
translations.es: Limpio la mesa con el paño.
translations.fr: J'essuie la table avec le chiffon.
translations.it: Pulisco il tavolo con il panno.
translations.pt: Eu limpo a mesa com o pano.
translations.he: אני מנגב את השולחן עם מטלית.
translations.nl: Ik neem de tafel af met een doek.
translations.hi: मैं कपड़े से मेज़ पोंछता हूँ.
translations.el: Σκουπίζω το τραπέζι με το πανί.
translations.nb: Jeg tørker av bordet med kluten.
translations.sv: Jag torkar av bordet med trasan.
translations.da: Jeg tørrer bordet af med kluden.
translations.ja: 布でテーブルを拭きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the finite verb 'wische'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting an accusative direct object ('den Tisch').
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; agrees with 'Tisch' and marks it as the direct object.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'wische'.
Preposition meaning 'with'; governs the dative and introduces an instrumental phrase.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; agrees with 'Tuch' as object of the preposition 'mit'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of 'mit', indicating the instrument used.

sentences.target: Sie trocknet die Gläser mit dem Tuch.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈtʁɔknət diː ˈɡlɛːzɐ mɪt deːm tuːx/

translations.de: Sie trocknet die Gläser mit dem Tuch.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈtʁɔknət diː ˈɡlɛːzɐ mɪt deːm tuːx/
translations.en: She dries the glasses with the cloth.
translations.es: Ella seca las copas con el paño.
translations.fr: Elle essuie les verres avec le chiffon.
translations.it: Lei asciuga i bicchieri con il panno.
translations.pt: Ela seca as taças com o pano.
translations.vi: Cô ấy lau khô ly bằng khăn.
translations.nl: Ze droogt de glazen af met een doek.
translations.hi: वह कपड़े से गिलास सुखाती है.
translations.el: Σκουπίζει τα ποτήρια με το πανί.
translations.ja: 彼女は布でグラスを拭きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of 'trocknet'. (Not formal 'Sie'; agreement with 3sg verb clarifies.)
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking the accusative object 'die Gläser'.
Definite article, accusative plural; agrees with 'Gläser' and marks them as the direct object.
Common noun, neuter, plural, accusative; direct object of 'trocknet'; umlauted plural of 'Glas'.
Preposition requiring dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; agrees with 'Tuch' as the object of 'mit'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of 'mit', denoting the instrument used for drying.

sentences.target: Ich lege das Tuch über die Schüssel.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːɡə das tuːx ˈyːbɐ diː ˈʃʏsl̩/

translations.de: Ich lege das Tuch über die Schüssel.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːɡə das tuːx ˈyːbɐ diː ˈʃʏsl̩/
translations.en: I place the cloth over the bowl.
translations.es: Pongo el paño sobre el tazón.
translations.fr: Je pose le torchon sur le bol.
translations.it: Metto il panno sopra la ciotola.
translations.pt: Eu coloco o pano sobre a tigela.
translations.he: אני מניח את המטלית על הקערה.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt khăn lên trên bát.
translations.nl: Ik leg de doek over de kom.
translations.hi: मैं कटोरे पर कपड़ा रखता हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω το πανί πάνω στο μπολ.
translations.id: Saya menaruh kain di atas mangkuk.
translations.ja: 布をボウルにかけます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular, 1st person; subject of 'lege'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb with direct object 'das Tuch' and a directional PP 'über die Schüssel'.
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; agrees with 'Tuch' as the direct object.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'lege'.
Preposition meaning 'over/above'; here governs accusative (direction/motion) in the PP 'über die Schüssel'.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; agrees with 'Schüssel' as the object of 'über'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'über' in a directional phrase.

sentences.target: Der Hund spielt mit dem Tuch.

translations.de: Der Hund spielt mit dem Tuch.
translations.en: The dog plays with the cloth.
translations.es: El perro juega con el trapo.
translations.fr: Le chien joue avec le chiffon.
translations.it: Il cane gioca con lo straccio.
translations.pt: O cachorro brinca com o pano.
translations.nl: De hond speelt met de doek.
translations.el: Ο σκύλος παίζει με το πανί.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; agrees with 'Hund' and marks the subject.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of 'spielt'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb here, accompanied by the PP 'mit dem Tuch'.
